nodes.name: Get Enriched Leads
nodes.notes: Capped at 10 per run - this workflow is the most expensive (screenshot + PageSpeed + AI vision per lead).

nodes.name: Take Screenshot
nodes.notes: Calls your self-hosted FastAPI/Playwright screenshot service. ADJUST the URL path and response field names below to match your actual API - assumed it returns { screenshot_url: '...', screenshot_base64: '...' }.

nodes.name: PageSpeed Insights
nodes.notes: PageSpeed Insights API uses the same key type as Google Maps - enable 'PageSpeed Insights API' in your GCP project, can reuse the same API key or create a separate one.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: "claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "user", content: [{ type: "image", source: { type: "base64", media_type: "image/png", data: $('Take Screenshot').item.json.screenshot_base64 } }, { type: "text", text: "This is a screenshot of a business website homepage. Identify visual/UX issues a small business owner would care about (outdated design, poor layout, bad mobile experience if visible, unclear calls-to-action, cluttered content, broken visual elements, unprofessional appearance, etc). Note: cookie consent banners have already been dismissed before this screenshot was taken, so do not flag cookie banners as an issue. Respond ONLY with a JSON array, no markdown, no preamble, in this exact format: [{\"issue\": \"short issue name\", \"severity\": \"high|medium|low\", \"description\": \"1-2 sentence description\"}]. List 2-4 issues maximum, most important first." }] }] } }}

nodes.name: AI Vision Analysis
nodes.notes: Uses Claude Sonnet 4.6 vision. Requires screenshot_base64 from the screenshot service - adjust field name to match your API's actual response.
